items.desc_zh: 据黎巴嫩卫生部称，至少九人死亡，其中包括两名儿童。

items.title_en: Intel's stock more than doubles in April for best month in chipmaker's 55 years on Nasdaq

items.desc_zh: 受井喷式盈利报告和对该芯片制造商正处于复兴之中的乐观情绪的推动，四月份英特尔的市值增加了一倍多。

items.desc_zh: 当美联储再次召开会议时，这将标志着近 80 年来首次现任主席和前任主席一起处理事务。

items.desc_en: The House on Thursday passed a Department of Homeland Security funding bill that the Senate had approved more than a month ago.
items.desc_zh: 众议院周四通过了参议院一个多月前批准的国土安全部拨款法案。

items.desc_zh: 该法案已获得美国参议院批准，现已移至唐纳德·特朗普总统的办公桌上，预计他将迅速签署该法案。

items.title_en: Trump expected to sign executive order expanding retirement account access for workers
items.title_zh: 特朗普预计将签署行政命令，扩大工人退休账户的使用范围
items.desc_en: The president's executive order will expand retirement account access for workers and will be integrated with the Saver's Match.
items.desc_zh: 总统的行政命令将扩大工人退休账户的使用范围，并将与储蓄者匹配计划相结合。

items.title_en: House strips MAHA-hated pesticide provisions from farm bill
items.title_zh: 众议院从农业法案中删除了 MAHA 讨厌的农药条款
items.desc_en: MAHA advocates said the language that was stripped could have provided liability protection for Bayer in lawsuits involving its Roundup weedkiller.
items.desc_zh: MAHA 的支持者表示，被删除的语言本可以在涉及拜耳农达除草剂的诉讼中为拜耳提供责任保护。

items.title_en: Apple eyes iPhone growth in first earnings report since Tim Cook's announced exit
items.title_zh: 苹果在蒂姆·库克宣布退出后的首份财报中关注 iPhone 的增长
items.desc_en: Apple is expected to report roughly 20% growth in iPhone revenue as the popularity of the company's flagship device shows no sign of waning.
items.desc_zh: 由于该公司旗舰设备的受欢迎程度没有减弱的迹象，预计苹果公司的 iPhone 收入将增长约 20%。

items.title_en: Google cloud growth tops Microsoft and Amazon as all three beat estimates on AI demand
items.title_zh: 谷歌云增长超过微软和亚马逊，这三者都超出了人工智能需求的预期
items.desc_en: Amazon, Google and Microsoft all reported better-than-expected first-quarter cloud results, signaling an acceleration of AI demand
items.desc_zh: 亚马逊、谷歌和微软第一季度云业绩均好于预期，表明人工智能需求加速

items.title_en: Man sentenced to death for murder of toddlers at Ugandan nursery
items.title_zh: 男子因在乌干达托儿所谋杀幼儿而被判处死刑
items.desc_en: Christopher Okello Onyum had pleaded insanity but this was dismissed by the judge.
items.desc_zh: 克里斯托弗·奥凯洛·奥纽姆 (Christopher Okello Onyum) 辩称精神错乱，但被法官驳回。

items.title_en: Dow is surging, Nasdaq is falling. The two factors splitting the markets in half: Live updates
items.title_zh: 道琼斯指数上涨，纳斯达克指数下跌。将市场一分为二的两个因素：实时更新

items.desc_zh: 投资者消化了亚马逊、Alphabet等七大巨头的最新季度报告。

items.title_en: OpenAI tells ChatGPT models to stop talking about goblins
items.title_zh: OpenAI 告诉 ChatGPT 模型停止谈论妖精
items.desc_en: The AI firm said that unlike previous model bugs, this issue "crept in subtly".
items.desc_zh: 这家人工智能公司表示，与之前的模型错误不同，这个问题“悄然出现”。

items.title_en: 'How are we going to get back home?' Islamist group tightens blockade on Mali capital
items.title_zh: “我们要怎么回家？”伊斯兰组织加强对马里首都的封锁
items.desc_en: The blockade comes days after Mali's defence minister was assassinated in a series of nationwide attacks.
items.desc_zh: 这次封锁发生在马里国防部长在一系列全国性袭击中被暗杀几天后。

items.title_en: Trump said his blockade would cause Iran's oil industry to 'explode' this week. Why that won't happen
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示，他的封锁将导致伊朗石油工业本周“爆炸”。为什么那不会发生
items.desc_en: The U.S. and Iran are locked in a standoff that will only break when one side decides it can no longer tolerate the pain. Who will move is unclear.
items.desc_zh: 美国和伊朗陷入僵局，只有当一方决定不再忍受痛苦时，这种僵局才会打破。谁将搬家尚不清楚。

items.title_en: Israel intercepts Gaza flotilla near Crete and detains 175 activists
items.title_zh: 以色列在克里特岛附近拦截加沙船队并拘留 175 名活动人士
items.desc_en: Pro-Palestinian activists say 22 boats carrying aid for Gaza were illegally intercepted in international waters near the Greek island.
items.desc_zh: 亲巴勒斯坦活动人士称，22艘向加沙运送援助物资的船只在希腊岛附近的国际水域被非法拦截。

items.title_en: Meta in row after workers who say they saw smart glasses users having sex lose jobs
items.title_zh: 那些声称看到智能眼镜用户发生性行为的工人失业后，Meta 连续失业
items.desc_en: Meta and its subcontractor disagree over why over 1000 Kenya-based workers were made redundant.
items.desc_zh: Meta 及其分包商对于为何裁员 1000 多名肯尼亚工人存在分歧。

items.title_en: Police say they believe abducted child was murdered as body found in Outback
items.title_zh: 警方表示，他们相信被绑架的儿童是被谋杀的，尸体在内陆地区被发现
items.desc_en: The five-year-old girl was last seen on Saturday at an Aboriginal town camp near Alice Springs.
items.desc_zh: 这名五岁女孩最后一次出现是在周六，地点是爱丽丝泉附近的一个原住民城镇营地。

items.title_en: China to ban drone sales in Beijing citing security concerns
items.title_zh: 中国以安全考虑为由禁止在北京销售无人机
items.desc_en: Drone users will also be required to register their devices and secure permits before flying them.
items.desc_zh: 无人机用户还需要在飞行前注册其设备并获得许可。

items.title_en: Christchurch mass killer loses bid to overturn conviction
items.title_zh: 基督城大屠杀凶手推翻定罪的努力失败
items.desc_en: White supremacist Brenton Tarrant's appeal is "utterly devoid of merit", a New Zealand court has ruled.
items.desc_zh: 新西兰法院裁定，白人至上主义者布伦顿·塔兰特的上诉“完全没有依据”。

items.title_en: Oil jumps to highest price since 2022 after report Trump to be briefed on new Iran options
items.title_zh: 特朗普将听取有关伊朗新选择的简报后油价跃升至 2022 年以来最高水平
items.desc_en: Axios reported that US Central Command has prepared a plan for a wave of "short and powerful" strikes on Iran.
items.desc_zh: Axios报道称，美国中央司令部已准备好对伊朗进行一波“短暂而有力”的打击的计划。

items.title_en: Trump says US studying troop cuts in Germany, after Merz criticises war
items.title_zh: 默茨批评战争后，特朗普表示美国正在研究削减驻德部队
items.desc_en: His remarks come after the German chancellor criticised the US approach to the war in Iran.
items.desc_zh: 在他发表上述言论之前，德国总理批评了美国对伊朗战争的态度。

items.title_en: US singer D4vd bought tools online to dispose of girl's body, prosecutors allege
items.title_zh: 检察官指控美国歌手 D4vd 在网上购买工具处理女孩尸体
items.desc_en: The Tiktok star's attorneys have maintained his innocence and vowed to "vigorously defend" him.
items.desc_zh: 这位抖音明星的律师坚称他无罪，并誓言“大力捍卫”他。

items.title_en: US charges Mexican governor and other leaders with aiding drug cartel
items.title_zh: 美国指控墨西哥州长和其他领导人协助贩毒集团
items.desc_en: The governor of Sinaloa, Rúben Rocha Moya, hails from the same party as the president of Mexico.
items.desc_zh: 锡那罗亚州州长鲁本·罗查·莫亚与墨西哥总统来自同一党派。

items.title_en: Musk accuses OpenAI lawyer of trying to 'trick' him in combative testimony
items.title_zh: 马斯克指责 OpenAI 律师试图在好斗的证词中“欺骗”他
items.desc_en: Elon Musk was cross-examined on the third day of the trial over his lawsuit against Sam Altman and OpenAI.
items.desc_zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 在审判的第三天就他对萨姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 和 OpenAI 的诉讼接受了盘问。

items.title_en: The friendlier the AI chatbot the more inaccurate it is, study suggests
items.title_zh: 研究表明，人工智能聊天机器人越友好，它就越不准确
items.desc_en: Researchers found adjusting AI systems to be more warm and friendly to users would result in an "accuracy trade-off".
items.desc_zh: 研究人员发现，将人工智能系统调整为对用户更加热情和友好会导致“准确性权衡”。

items.title_en: Musk says basis of charitable giving at stake in OpenAI lawsuit
items.title_zh: 马斯克表示 OpenAI 诉讼中慈善捐赠的基础受到威胁
items.desc_en: The case over OpenAI's history and public commitments could have major implications for the future of AI.
items.desc_zh: 关于 OpenAI 的历史和公开承诺的案例可能会对人工智能的未来产生重大影响。

items.title_zh: 科技生活

items.title_en: Social media restrictions for under-16s even if no ban, minister says
items.title_zh: 部长表示，即使没有禁令，对 16 岁以下青少年的社交媒体也有限制
items.desc_en: The government is consulting on changes as a new social media law goes through its final Parliamentary stages.
items.desc_zh: 随着新的社交媒体法进入议会最后阶段，政府正在就修改进行咨询。

items.title_en: Musk v Altman: Why the tech billionaires and former friends are now facing off in court
items.title_zh: 马斯克诉奥特曼：为什么科技亿万富翁和前朋友现在在法庭上对峙
items.desc_en: The battle between the AI big hitters has largely played out on social media. Now it is coming to the courtroom.
items.desc_zh: 人工智能巨头之间的战斗主要在社交媒体上展开。现在它来到了法庭。

items.title_en: Valve's £85 Steam Controller divides gamers ahead of May launch
items.title_zh: Valve 售价 85 英镑的 Steam 控制器在 5 月发布前吸引了玩家
items.desc_en: The pad will be compatible with PCs, Valve's handheld console, the Steam Deck as well as its upcoming gaming PC.
items.desc_zh: 该垫将与 PC、Valve 的手持控制台、Steam Deck 以及即将推出的游戏 PC 兼容。

items.title_en: Why Spotify has no button to filter out AI music
items.title_zh: 为什么Spotify没有过滤AI音乐的按钮
items.desc_en: Music streamer Deezer allows users to filter out AI music, so why does Spotify not offer the same?
items.desc_zh: 音乐流媒体 Deezer 允许用户过滤 AI 音乐，那么为什么 Spotify 不提供同样的服务呢？

items.title_en: China blocks Meta's $2bn acquisition of AI start-up Manus
items.title_zh: 中国阻止 Meta 以 20 亿美元收购人工智能初创公司 Manus
items.desc_en: It comes after months of scrutiny by Chinese regulators over deal struck with Facebook owner.
items.desc_zh: 在此之前，中国监管机构对与 Facebook 所有者达成的交易进行了数月的审查。
